ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
$Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended"&& $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps"&& $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator"&& RecordType.Name ="Partnership"&&
(ISCHANGED(StageName) && ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Engagement")|| ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Engagement")) && ( ISPICKVAL( Primary_Use_Case__c,"" )|| ISPICKVAL( Type,"") ) && NOT(ISCHANGED( Owner_s_Manager__c ))&& NOT(ISNEW())&& NOT(ISCHANGED(Account_owner_changed__c))&& NOT (Account_owner_changed__c) = FALSE && NOT(ISCHANGED(Opportunity_Division__c))&& NOT(ISPICKVAL(Opportunity_Division__c,""))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Mandatory fields at Engagement stage: Type,What is the customer's use case(s)?
